name: baml
description: Teaches Claude Code to write idiomatic BAML (the baml_language rewrite). A describe-first `core` skill: discover each stdlib name as needed via `baml describe`. BAML is a statically-typed, expression-oriented language (basically TypeScript with snake_case methods and `name: type,` fields) with first-class LLM functions, backtick strings + `${...}` interpolation, `.to_string()`, and interfaces. The CLI is the reference — the skill names the key best practices and otherwise defers to `baml describe` for every stdlib name, type, and signature rather than guessing. The arena-winning micro-describe variant.
